sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n9833" key="a)ntige/nesis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀντιγένεσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, Astrol., <sense id="n9833.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">recasting of nativity in a later year,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:213:20" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">213.20</biblScope></bibl>,al.</sense> </entryFree>
